fit_on: scaffold validation logits, model frozen, BCE-minimizing scalar T per endpoint

properties.roc_auc_preserved: verified: AUC_before == AUC_after on every endpoint

notes: T<1 => model was underconfident (raw probabilities too close to 0.5); T>1 => overconfident. NR-Aromatase and SR-MMP regress slightly on test (val->test generalization gap on scaffold split). Displayed probabilities use p = sigmoid(logit / T); decision thresholds are remapped through the same monotonic transform so toxic/safe verdicts are unchanged.
